nasb.text: When the jubilee of the sons of Israel comes, then their inheritance will be added to the inheritance of the tribe to which they belong; so their inheritance will be withdrawn from the inheritance of the tribe of our fathers.”

esv.text: And when the jubilee of the people of Israel comes, then their inheritance will be added to the inheritance of the tribe into which they marry, and their inheritance will be taken from the inheritance of the tribe of our fathers.”

cnv.text: 到了以色列人的禧年，她們的產業就要加在她們丈夫支派的產業上；這樣，她們的產業就要從我們祖宗支派的產業中被拿去了。”

ccb.text: 到了以色列人的禧年，这些女儿的产业就会归给她们丈夫的支派，我们支派的祖业就会失去她们那份产业。”
